problem id: 0c2407ef
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(3)) AND ROT(6)

examples:
  11001100 -> 00010001
  01101001 -> 01001000
  11101000 -> 00011000
  11111001 -> 01011110
  01101111 -> 11001001
  00110110 -> 10000100
  01011001 -> 01000010
  10110111 -> 11000100
  01010000 -> 00000000

query: 10011111
predicted answer: 11000011
